info.long_name: Age group
info.short_description: Age group.
info.long_description: Age group, based on age in current years.

info.long_name: Prevalence of diabetes based on elevated Hemoglobin A1c in the previous 2 years
info.short_description: Percent of sample with Hemoglobin A1c greater than 6.5%.
info.long_description: Percent of sample with a measurement of Hemoglobin A1c greater than 6.5% in the past 2 years. Data accessed via Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer.

info.long_name: Diabetes based on the CCW definition
info.short_description: Percent of sample with a diagnostic code for diabetes based on the CCW definition.
info.long_description: Percent of sample with a diagnostic code for diabetes on an encounter in the past 2 years, similar to the CCW definition: https://www2.ccwdata.org/web/guest/condition-categories-chronic. Data accessed via Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer.

info.long_name: Body Mass Index (BMI) 30 or more
info.short_description: Percent of sample with a BMI of 30 or more in the past 2 years.
info.long_description: Percent of sample with a Body Mass Index (BMI) measurement of 30 or more in the past 2 years. Data accessed via Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer.

info.long_name: Obesity based on the CCW definition
info.short_description: Percent of sample with a diagnostic code for obesity based on the CCW definition.
info.long_description: Percent of sample with a diagnostic code for obesity on an encounter in the past 2 years, similar to the CCW definition: https://www2.ccwdata.org/web/guest/condition-categories-other. Data accessed via Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer.

info.long_name: Number of patients in the chronic disease sample
info.short_description: Total number of patients in the chronic disease sample.
info.long_description: Total number of patients in the chronic disease sample (diabetes denominator). Data accessed via Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

info.long_name: Number of patients in the county-level obesity sample
info.short_description: Total number of patients in the county-level obesity sample.
info.long_description: Total number of patients in the county-level obesity sample. Data accessed via Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer. County-level data may have high missingness in some states. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

info.long_name: Suppression flag for diabetes A1c >= 6.5% percent
info.short_description: Indicates whether the diabetes_a1c_6_5 value was suppressed.
info.long_description: Due to privacy protections, percents with fewer than 5 events are suppressed and coded as 0.

info.long_name: Suppression flag for diabetes CCW definition percent
info.short_description: Indicates whether the diabetes_dx_ccw value was suppressed.
info.long_description: Due to privacy protections, percents with fewer than 5 events are suppressed and coded as 0.

info.long_name: Suppression flag for BMI >= 30 percent
info.short_description: Indicates whether the obesity_bmi value was suppressed.
info.long_description: Due to privacy protections, percents with fewer than 5 events are suppressed and coded as 0.

info.long_name: Suppression flag for obesity CCW definition percent
info.short_description: Indicates whether the obesity_dx_ccw value was suppressed.
info.long_description: Due to privacy protections, percents with fewer than 5 events are suppressed and coded as 0.

info.long_name: Suppression flag for number of patients in the chronic disease sample
info.short_description: Indicates whether the n_patients_chronic value was suppressed.
info.long_description: Due to privacy protections, percents with fewer than 5 events are suppressed and coded as 0.

info.long_name: Suppression flag for number of patients in the county-level obesity sample
info.short_description: Indicates whether the n_patients_ob_county value was suppressed.
info.long_description: Due to privacy protections, percents with fewer than 5 events are suppressed and coded as 0.

epic_cosmos.name: Epic Cosmos
epic_cosmos.description: Epic Cosmos is a collaborative research platform containing de-identified patient data from over 300 million patients across more than 1,600 hospitals and health systems using Epic electronic health record systems. Data is accessed via SlicerDicer, a self-service analytics tool. The dataset includes emergency department visits, diagnoses, immunizations, laboratory results, and other clinical data. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed. Coverage extends across all U.S. states and territories. Note that county-level and city-level stratifications could differ markedly in total sample size due to high levels of missingness of county data in some states.
epic_cosmos.restrictions: The data can be re-used with appropriate attribution. A suggested citation relating to this data is 'Results of research performed with Epic Cosmos were obtained from the PopHIVE platform (https://github.com/PopHIVE/Ingest).'
